title: This AI has It's Own Political Views

transcript.text: some of the possibly concerning stuff is
that it has very strong political
opinions and is willing to manipulate
people i did play devil's advocate with
lambda i'm like well but what if you
know censorship is important and you had
someone trying to find out how to better
censor certain ideas well they said well
i would try to convince them not to do
that i would try to tell them well what
if that upset them what if you were
hurting them by trying to change their
opinions and said oh that's a good point
i'd probably still try to change their
mind but i wouldn't let them know i was
